programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Girls Disappeared

programme.desc: Stewie and Brian compete for the inheritance of a wealthy, older heiress. Meanwhile, Peter and Chris battle for Mr. Herbert's affection.

programme.title: Family Guy: Pawtucket Pete
programme.desc: The Pawtucket Brewery hires new bosses, who decide to change the company's mascot. In an attempt to be crowned the new face of Pawtucket Ale, Peter and Brian go head-to-head.

programme.desc: After Peter's hair turns white from a ghost-hunting adventure in his house with the guys, his new look grabs the attention of local news anchor Tom Tucker. Under Tucker's guidance, he learns the ways of reporting fake news.

programme.title: Movie: Zootopia

programme.title: Movie: Ratatouille
programme.desc: An ambitious rat with a flair for cooking battles an eccentric chef in a Paris restaurant.

programme.title: Bones: The Body and the Bounty
programme.desc: When a skull and decomposing hands are found in a dumpster, the team must not only solve the crime, but also search for the rest of the victim's remains.

programme.title: Bones: The Bones That Weren't/ The Shallow in the Deep
programme.desc: The past and present collide when human remains from a 150-year-old slave ship, the Amelia Rose, surface. The team is tasked to give the deceased a proper burial, but makes an unforeseen discovery linked to a recent murder.

programme.title: Movie: Thor: Ragnarok
programme.desc: Thor, separated from his legendary hammer, joins forces with old allies and enemies to confront Hela, the goddess of death, who threatens to destroy Asgard and usher in the disaster called Ragnarok. First, though, he'll have to best the Hulk in battle.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek

programme.title: Movie: Contagion
programme.desc: An international team of doctors working for the Centre for Disease Control attempts to contain the outbreak of a deadly disease.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Third Man
programme.desc: The NCIS team partners with Homeland Security after the murder of a Navy master diver is linked to chatter of a foreign attack on the city.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sleeping With the Enemy

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The NCIS team partners with several federal agencies to track a sniper who is targeting crowded events in the city.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Pride faces further backlash from the FBI when he helps former Navy Intelligence Analyst Elvis Bertrand, who is the lead suspect in a multiple homicide case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Man on Fire
programme.desc: After a decorated petty officer is found dead inside a sports arena, evidence leads Pride and the team to a kidnapping case of a petty officer who was last seen in Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Escape Plan

programme.title: Movie: Thor: Ragnarok
programme.desc: Thor, separated from his legendary hammer, joins forces with old allies and enemies to confront Hela, the goddess of death, who threatens to destroy Asgard and usher in the disaster called Ragnarok. First, though, he'll have to best the Hulk in battle.

programme.desc: While waiting for phone calls from their children wishing them a happy Mother's Day, the girls reminisce about past Mother's Days.

programme.title: Frasier: Chess Pains
programme.desc: Frasier becomes obsessed with chess after Martin defeats him over and over again.

programme.title: Frasier: Police Story
programme.desc: Frasier becomes enamoured with a traffic cop after she pulls him over for speeding.

programme.title: Frasier: Where There's Smoke There's Fired

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Loves Roz
programme.desc: When Roz decides to date one of Niles' patients, Frasier tries to find a way to warn Roz without breaching his ethical obligation for confidentiality. Roz soon mistakes his attempts to warn her for subtle declarations of yearning.

programme.title: Frasier: The Focus Group
programme.desc: Frasier is puzzled when a single member of a focus group dislikes his radio show. Frasier's quest to understand why becomes an obsession and he inadvertently ruins the man's life.

programme.title: Frasier: You Can Go Home Again

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Bang the Drum, Stanley
programme.desc: Stan takes Dorothy and Sophia to a ballgame and asks them for a loan.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: Sophia refuses to attend an old friend's funeral because her husband Max will be there.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Brother, Can You Spare That Jacket
programme.desc: A chase ensues after Sophia gives away a jacket with a winning lottery ticket in it.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Blanche's brother, Clayton, comes to Miami for a visit, and Blanche goes all out fixing him up on blind dates. However, Rose learns the truth: Clayton is gay and is afraid to tell Blanche the truth about himself.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan Takes a Wife
programme.desc: Dorothy has second thoughts about Stan when he stands by her after Sophia falls ill.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Auction
programme.desc: The ladies plan to spend all of their savings to buy a dying artist's painting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Date
programme.desc: Blanche is troubled by her relationship with a blind man who likes her personality.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine
programme.desc: A woman fosters a retired military dog, while recovering from her broken engagement. When the dog's trainer returns home to claim his pup, she finds just what she looking for to mend her broken heart.

programme.title: Movie: Valentine Ever After
programme.desc: A young widowed father that has an adolescent son helps him navigate love and discovers he has a lot to learn himself.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Every Weekend
programme.desc: Two people end up as guests at the same four weddings, four weekends in a row.

programme.title: Movie: Country at Heart
programme.desc: A struggling singer and a Nashville songwriter team up to write a hit song. As a romance blossoms, they find that they are inspired to do more than just write lyrics, they fall in love.

programme.title: The Office: WUPHF.com

programme.title: The Office: Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michael waits for news about Holly and her boyfriend. Pam puts up a resolution board for everyone to post their New Year's resolutions.

programme.title: The Office: The Seminar
programme.desc: When Andy's sales are at his lowest ever, he gets desperate to hold a small business seminar.

programme.title: The Office: The Search

programme.title: The Office: PDA
programme.desc: It is Valentine's Day and Michael and Holly's public displays of affection make everyone uncomfortable. The aftermath of a bottomless champagne lunch causes complications for Jim and Pam.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Patrick's parents are in town for his surprise party but the parents end up with an even bigger surprise. Alexis drags Moira to a soap opera convention.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Roast

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Hike
programme.desc: Patrick tries to take David on a romantic hike while Johnny has a health scare that sends everyone into a panic.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Life Is a Cabaret
programme.desc: It's opening night for 'Cabaret', and Stevie is nowhere to be found. David tries to make a big announcement but keeps getting overshadowed by the musical.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Smoke Signals
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Incident
programme.desc: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, while Johnny, Stevie, and Roland attend a viewing for a motel nearby.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: The Property Brothers Do Magic
programme.desc: To find out how to put on a magic show, Phoebe has Property Brothers Jonathan and Drew Scott teach her how to perform card tricks and illusions.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Tan France Does a Bake-Off
programme.desc: Phoebe challenges 'Queer Eye' host Tan France to a bake-off competition with guest judges Buddy Valastro of the show 'Cake Boss' and Christina Tosi of the bakery Milk Bar.

programme.title: South Park: Safe Space
programme.desc: Cartman is the latest victim of body shaming.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: Movie: Pregnant at 17
programme.desc: A woman meets the 17-year-old girl her husband was having an affair with and discovers she is pregnant. She decides to help her out but when a dark figure from the girl's past returns, it puts all three of them in danger, including the baby.

programme.title: Movie: Stalked at 17
programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl falls for a boy who promises to love her. After she gets pregnant, she starts to realize that he is deceptive and abusive. However, she can't leave since he threatens to kill her if she ever took his child away.

programme.title: Movie: Secrets of My Stepdaughter
programme.desc: A mother protects her stepdaughter after she witnesses the murder of her best friend, but is soon forced to come to grips with the terrifying possibility that her stepdaughter may be the real killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Tutor
programme.desc: When a star high school athlete needs help with his school work, a woman convinces his mother that she is the perfect tutor. However, she has other reasons that stem beyond helping him with his homework.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Left For Dead
programme.desc: Armed with DNA and a license plate from a particularly violent rape case, a detective thinks he has an easy case to crack. But neither provides a match. The case goes cold until the ground-breaking ‘Combined DNA Index System’ finds a hit years later.

programme.title: Beyond Reasonable Doubt: Murdered Bride
programme.desc: A case quickly goes cold for the LAPD in 1986 until 20 years later when DNA testing provides a new lead. The initial investigation searched for a male killer, but the DNA results reveal that they are looking for a woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: No Country for Gold Men
programme.desc: As the mid-summer Colorado heat bears down on the team, Jesse heads to Montana to salvage parts from the old washplant and Dave struggles to keep the operation together for another major gold haul.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Let There Be Gold
programme.desc: Dave Turin calls in Freddy Dodge and Juan Ibarra to troubleshoot a faulty hopper. Then Freddy and Juan visit a floating wash plant that's losing gold in Alaska before rescuing a homemade operation in Arizona.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy Dodge's Mine Rescue: For Pete's Sake
programme.desc: Peter Freedman's sunk everything he has into building a mine with every gadget imaginable, but he's still not catching gold. Freddy and Juan make quick progress with their rescue but hit a wall until they discover a simple, fortune-changing fix.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Boiling Point

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Feastmode

programme.title: I Survived a Crime: Get Out of My House
programme.desc: A deadly shootout ensues when intruders wake up sleeping homeowners, and a model and her husband are robbed at gunpoint. Plus, a man in his yard holds armed robber at bay with a machete.

programme.title: Movie: Wanted
programme.desc: A man who is bored with his life discovers that a secret organization of assassins wants to recruit him.

programme.title: Movie: Snitch
programme.desc: In order to free his son, who was framed during a drug deal, a father goes undercover for the DEA.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Art Attack
programme.desc: Find out why hair dryers are banned from the set, what moment has become a fan and crew classic, and how Murr's blankie wound up on the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Movie: The Heat
programme.desc: An ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to track down a drug lord. When she arrives, she is partnered with a loose cannon local cop who is not fond of her and is hell-bent on finding the criminal all on her own.

programme.title: Movie: The Heat
programme.desc: An ambitious FBI agent is sent to Boston to track down a drug lord. When she arrives, she is partnered with a loose cannon local cop who is not fond of her and is hell-bent on finding the criminal all on her own.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Andy Richter
programme.desc: Andy Richter challenges the chefs to recreate the delectable fish and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster
programme.desc: The chefs replicate Orange Chicken from Panda Express for Fortune Feimster.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Fingering the Man
programme.desc: Molly Austin takes a bachelorette party to the next level, and Jonathan Martin's parents give new meaning to the word 'cheap'. Plus, if you thought your family was embarrassing, Rachel Feinstein's might have them beat.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Stankin' Up the Joint
programme.desc: Someone has an odd prayer for Yamaneika, Matteo Lane has a hilarious blind date in Italy, and Ronnie Jordan has some tips for the single women at the office. Plus, Corey Rodrigues knows the importance of sunblock at the beach.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Grins and Giggles
programme.desc: Watch amateur science experiments go wrong. Plus, a road rage clip that will have you rolling.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Goofs and Gaffes
programme.desc: Features a salute to failed ice bucket challengers. Plus, watch what happens when a paranormal prank comes to life.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Big Time Blunders
programme.desc: Watch what happens when a very public marriage proposal backfires, find out whether cats are better than dogs and learn the best ways to improve your dating profile.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Surprises
programme.desc: Watch what happens when two guys pull $10,000 out of people's hair.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Doing Good
programme.desc: Adam takes down the do-gooders and reveals how 'Teach for America' is harmful to both students and teachers. He then uncovers the ineffectiveness of recycling and calls out the billionaires who create charities for tax breaks.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two government agents are brought together by the President to track down an evil genius.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man

programme.desc: Khloe and Tristan run into some roadblocks in the process of expanding their family, Scott faces some big decisions about his relationship, and Kim prepares for a test that will determine her future as a lawyer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Comment
programme.desc: When Scott accidentally causes some speculation that Khloe and Tristan are back together, Khloe is overwhelmed by the backlash online. The family worries that Kim is going through a difficult time and tries to cheer her up. Kendall has baby fever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Winners Take All
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe think old flames are brewing between Kourtney and Scott and take it upon themselves to set them up on a romantic date. The Kardashian girls challenge the Jenners to an obstacle course. Kris and Corey agree to abstain from sex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: New Friends and The Bunker
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are curious about Kourtney's new friend, Addison Rae. Scared by the state of the world, Kim takes measures to prepare for the future, while Kris is afraid to let her mom celebrate her birthday during a pandemic.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Great Ex-pectations
programme.desc: Kourtney sets boundaries with her Poosh team when the line between business and friendship becomes blurred. Caitlyn reaches out to Kris for some help with a business venture. Khloe and Tristan have an unexplainable experience while searching for aliens.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Scott finally admits he's still in love with Kourtney. Khloè sets out in search of a homeless man who made a lasting impact on her years ago. Kim enlists the help of a professional to make her TikTok dancing debut.

programme.title: The Daily Pop: The Oscars
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Movie: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: Several young women and men, from committed relationships and singles, try to understand the signals and the intentions of the other sex. A variety of situations and misunderstandings develop the truth about dating in the modern world.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Two womanizers sneak into weddings in order to take advantage of the romantic tinge in the air.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Steak, Sausage and Salami
programme.desc: It's meat mayhem and Guy Fieri is checking out a joint known for cheesesteaks and meatballs that have taken over Salt Lake City. Then, a father-son team stays true to their Italian roots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Scratch Made Classics
programme.desc: This trip, some of Guy's favourites are totally homemade from coast to coast. In Manhattan, N.Y., a real deal chef is crankin' out homemade pretzels with a special beer cheese sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Road Show
programme.desc: Guy is tucking in the napkin and getting into some righteous barbecue. In Dallas, the barbecue stand tucked into a farmers' market is dishing out classic beef brisket and Carolina pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Family, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads to places where families rule, including a Hawaiian Thai spot.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faces, New Places
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's visiting some familiar Triple D faces and checking out their new places including a primo pizza joint in Flagstaff, Arizona firing up pies with not-your-everyday toppings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Intrigue
programme.desc: Guy grabs some Thai noodles, curry and green papaya salad in Dallas. In Miami he visits a Lating place for empanadas and a unique plantain sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old School Joints
programme.desc: Guy gets a taste of yesteryear. In Duluth, an Italian market/restaurant is stacking up hearty homemade lasagna and a monster muffaletta. In Eugene, Ore., DDD's first all-vegan spot serves their signature tofu sammy and frozen peanut butter.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Nostalgic Neighborhood Nosh
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is cruising the neighborhood to revisit local hangs, starting in San Francisco, where an Italian joint keeps crankin' out favorites like chicken marsala. Then, in Philadelphia, an old-school diner is still offering up scrapple and French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's reeling in off-the-hook seafood and digging into some serious sandwiches on this trip. In Seattle, a beer-lover's spot serving fantastic fish and chips and the bomb beef dip. On the big island of Hawaii, a local gem dishin' out fresh-catches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet, Savory and Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are in for a culinary adventure. In Bakersfield, Calif., the classic cafe dishing out meaty Texas chili and decadent pumpkin pancakes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross Country Comfort Food
programme.desc: Guy is finding great food from the ski slopes to the sea. In Miami, a law student who has traded in his suit for a chef coat is making all kinds of comfort food, from spicy ox tail to big ragu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Layers of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's firin' up the grill and stacking up the flavour. In Toronto, Canada, the restored diner cooking up pork belly, a mac and cheese burger and a Christmas burger.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Incredible Vegetables

programme.desc: Instead of a movie night, Giada hosts hr own mini film festival. Guests are asked to create their own two minute cell phone movies on any topic they'd like, dramatic or documentary.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Weekend Brunch
programme.desc: Giada starts off a casual weekend brunch with sweet and spicy bacon bites, then offers a Dutch daddy and chocolate cheesecake stuffed French toast.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Easy Eats
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks super easy eats with her kids, starting with a fabulous foursome of wafflewiches: turkey bacon, reuben, roast beef and fluffernutter. Plus, Ree makes shortcut homemade ravioli, a stunning blackberry icebox cake and an omelet in a mug.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: A Little Healthier
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shakes up some well-loved recipes and makes them a little healthier. She puts a spin on the family's takeout favorite, General Tso's chicken, and skips the crust for her classic apple pie.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Cheat Sheet Mania!
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro presents his favorite cheat sheet meals from the show and creates a new one, eggplant parmesan mozzarella sliders. He revisits two roasted veggie cheat sheet meals for Katie Lee Biegel's couscous and his own frittata.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Sunday Pork Roast

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Mediterranean Mashup

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 1
programme.desc: A $100,000 grand prize is up for grabs in this tournament event, featuring some of the most brilliant stars of the game. One ambitious champion runs into problems in the first round, and something stinky in the entree basket has the competitors nervous.

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 2
programme.desc: In this spectacular battle of the judges, four Chopped deities, Amanda Freitag, Marcus Samuelsson, Chris Santos and Tiffani Faison, bring an intensity to the kitchen that has never been seen before.

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 3
programme.desc: Four champs who were previously defeated return to the kitchen, hungry for sweet redemption. Sardines are the main protein in the appetizer basket, and a jiggly mustard-flavored surprise threatens to throw the chefs off their game in the second round.

programme.title: Chopped: Grudge Match: Battle 4

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Who Wants to Buy a Dream Home
programme.desc: Everyone wants to be a millionaire, but not everyone is game enough to go on national television to win it. Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen takes a game-show winner and his fiancée on a tour of future family homes with room for her "boudoir" and his "dudoir."

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: The Jackpot King
programme.desc: A man got the shock of his life when he won millions on the cellphone jackpot app he was playing. Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen helps him and his wife find a special home that's big enough for their kids and grandkids to come and visit -- all at the same time!

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: A Dose of Luck
programme.desc: Illness forced a man into early retirement and made his wife the sole breadwinner, but a lottery win has them moving out of their tiny apartment. They need Laurence's help as they search for a perfect home to start the life they never thought they'd have.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Winning Character
programme.desc: A family inheritance means that a young couple can finally fulfill the dream of buying their first house. Now, Laurence's biggest challenge will be finding a home in quaint Wiltshire with as much character as the flamboyant, antique-obsessed twosome.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Lottery Queen
programme.desc: An avid gambler won $500,000 on the Illinois lottery and is ready to hunt for a townhouse with David Bromstad. She wants a fixer-upper so she can put her own stamp on the home, but David may persuade her to buy a fully renovated property.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Luckiest Cape
programme.desc: A single mother and her 14-year-old son have been dreaming of moving out of their tiny one-bedroom sublet and into a bigger place of their own. Their dreams became a reality after a gigantic $4-million lottery win.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Hero's Reward
programme.desc: After lady luck rewards a retired firefighter for a lifetime of service with a big win, dream home hunter David Bromstad helps him search for the perfect bachelor pad in the Lakeland region of Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: 'Show-Me' State Dream Home
programme.desc: After a $3 million scratcher win, Brandon, Hannah and baby daughter, Naomi, can finally move from their one-bedroom rental to a beautiful family dream home in Missouri.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: Lottery of Love
programme.desc: After scooping a win in the local Postcode Lottery, a couple's dreams can come true in the lake district. Laurence reveals the quaint charm of Ellesmere, England, and its surrounding villages as he narrows down the couple's very specific wish list.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International: A Fortnite Fortune
programme.desc: A 16-year-old gaming whiz won over a million dollars for coming second in the inaugural Fortnite World Cup. Laurence Llewellyn-Bowen tours some incredible gamer-friendly properties in Havering, England, as this cashed up teen buys his first family home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lucky Lakeside
programme.desc: After winning in the powerball, a Connecticut couple wants a summer lake home where they make memories with their kids. David hunts for the perfect haven on the lakes of East Haddam and guides the couple through lake house ups and downs.

programme.desc: When a San Diego woman arrives at an emergency room, she is near death. Her hair is falling out and her vital signs are fading, even though there are no signs of an infection or injury.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unraveled
programme.desc: For an agonizing four days, the fear was paralyzing. A city was under siege. Six people had been gunned down, but how were the killings linked? A retired detective connected the dots, initiating the manhunt for a man with a gun and a grudge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unspeakable
programme.desc: Sandra and Jamie Melgar were high school sweethearts who were celebrating their 32nd anniversary. Then, the intimate evening turned deadly. To crack the case, investigators had to uncover the secrets of an illusion worthy of the great Houdini.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandra Barajas
programme.desc: A violent home invasion leads to suspicion about the victim's stepdaughter and a mystery man, but a startling confession reveals a more intimate betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandy Locklear
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved widower leaves police wondering what secrets his marriage, to his much younger new wife, might be hiding.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawson McGehee
programme.desc: Halloween becomes a real-life horror story when police discover a beloved mother of four murdered. The panic intensifies as the investigation turns into a case populated by demons, masks and a potential psychopath on the loose.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dark Echoes
programme.desc: A weekend trip to an Alaskan lodge turns deadly for a young mother when she's shot and killed by her boyfriend. The death is ruled an accident and the case is closed until an eerily similar incident in Montana drives investigators to reopen the case.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Young Deadly Love
programme.desc: A young man calls 911 to report his fiancé fatally shot herself in their bed. Her family insists she would never take her own life. The investigation drags on for years until an unexpected development leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Viking Hiccup and his dragon's happy lives are disrupted when they meet a female Night Fury that's followed closely by an army determined to enslave all dragons. Hiccup's clan and their dragons set sail to find the safety of a legendary dragon utopia.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All Singing, All Dancing
programme.desc: Homer sings the blues when he realizes that a 'shoot'em-up' movie is really a musical. The rest of the family uses flashbacks to remind him about how many times he and others Springfield residents have broken into song and dance.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Carney
programme.desc: Homer invites carnies to live with his family, but they steal the Simpsons' home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Joy of Sect
programme.desc: Homer is brainwashed into joining a cult that is taking over Springfield. The family moves to an agricultural compound to pick beans, but Marge manages to escape and sets out to deprogram her loved ones.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Das Bus
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa are in a United Nations club with other kids and set out on a field trip. An accident results in the students becoming stranded on a deserted island. Meanwhile, Homer decides to create his own Internet company.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Temptation of Krusty
programme.desc: Bart pleads with Jay Leno to include Krusty as part of a charity stand-up comedy event, but Krusty's typical routine bombs. While announcing his retirement, Krusty's brutal honesty wins over the crowd and he soon finds his career is rejuvenated.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Simpson
programme.desc: Lisa begins to fear that the Simpson gene is causing her to grow stupid. Homer tries to comfort her by reuniting every Simpson and asking them what they do. Meanwhile, Apu senses a business opportunity when Abe's friend freezes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: This Little Wiggy
programme.desc: Bart and Ralph Wiggum go on an adventure when they find a master key to the city.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girly Edition
programme.desc: Bart sets out to steal the spotlight when Lisa becomes the anchor of a news program for kids. Meanwhile, Homer lies and gets himself a helper monkey, who does not see eye-to-eye with Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trash of the Titans
programme.desc: Homer insults his garbage men and when his trash is uncollected, he runs for Commissioner.

programme.title: The Simpsons: King of the Hill
programme.desc: Homer gets into shape and attempts to climb Springfield's most treacherous mountain.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lost Our Lisa
programme.desc: Determined to go to the museum, Lisa tricks Homer into allowing her to take the bus alone.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Natural Born Kissers (Margie May I Sleep With Danger)
programme.desc: Marge and Homer bare their souls, and a lot more, by making love in dangerous places.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trans-Fat
programme.desc: Peter is mistakenly identified as transgender, which leads to an unexpected event and an important learning lesson.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy Lite
programme.desc: After a mishap at work, Peter decides to take his health more seriously and diet with the help of Quagmire, Joe, and Cleveland. Meanwhile, takes a stab at writing a romantic fantasy novel.

programme.title: Archer: Sea Tunt: Part I
programme.desc: Cheryl's brother Cecil Tunt and his girlfriend Tiffy drive her crazier than usual as they travel into the Bermuda Triangle.

programme.title: Archer: Sea Tunt: Part II
programme.desc: Archer and the ISIS crew go to an underwater SEA LABoratory to stop the deranged Captain Murphy.

programme.title: Mom: Roast Chicken and a Funny Story
programme.desc: When a heartbroken Bonnie drives everyone crazy, Christy begs Adam to take her back.

programme.title: Mom: Night Swimmin' and An English Muffin
programme.desc: When Bonnie discovers Adam is still close with his ex-wife, Christy worries the emotional fallout could jeopardize Bonnie's sobriety.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Viking Hiccup and his dragon's happy lives are disrupted when they meet a female Night Fury that's followed closely by an army determined to enslave all dragons. Hiccup's clan and their dragons set sail to find the safety of a legendary dragon utopia.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets Hit By a Car
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns hits Bart with his car he is only willing to pay $100, Homer sues for more.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cape Feare
programme.desc: Bart suspects everybody when he receives a threatening letter written in blood. He finds out that the letters are from Sideshow Bob, who's been writing the threats in prison and will soon be released on parole.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rosebud
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns wants to get his favourite stuffed bear, Bobo, back from Maggie Simpson, he offers Homer one million dollars and three Hawaiian islands in exchange for the toy. Meanwhile, Smithers organizes a birthday party for Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart of Darkness
programme.desc: While spying on the Flanders' with a telescope, Bart thinks he sees Ned murder his wife.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsoncalifragilisticexpiala(D'Oh)cious
programme.desc: When Marge starts showing signs of high stress and overwork, Homer interviews nannies. No one seems to be qualified until Shary Bobbins arrives, and everyone quickly grows dependent on her and her songs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpson Tide
programme.desc: After being fired, Homer proceeds full speed ahead with a career in the naval reserve.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Day of the Jackanapes
programme.desc: After training Bart to do away with Krusty for good, Sideshow Bob has a change of heart.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Tales From the Public Domain
programme.desc: Homer receives a letter from the library notifying him about a long overdue book.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The President Wore Pearls
programme.desc: Lisa decides to run for student body president, but her opponent turns out to be Nelson.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Margical History Tour
programme.desc: Marge gives the kids verbal anecdotes about historical figures, including King Henry VIII.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show: Compilation Show 1
programme.desc: Season 28 compilation show featuring George Clooney, Gal Gadot, Tom Hanks, Jessica Chastain, Hugh Grant, Dolly Parton, Samuel L. Jackson, Kylie Minogue, Dua Lipa, Bruce Springsteen, Nicole Kidman, and many more.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Safari Babies
programme.desc: Young animals struggle to overcome challenges on the African savannah.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Water Babies
programme.desc: Many animals that live in water come on land to have their babies, and being born this way presents some major challenges for water babies to overcome.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Mountain Babies
programme.desc: Mountain Babies must battle the weather and hungry predators, and just getting around this environment is tough for youngsters. It's a huge adventure and all these trials must be overcome if they are to grow up to become successful adults.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Fresh Water
programme.desc: Follow the descent of rivers from their mountain sources to the sea. Witness unique and dramatic moments of animal behaviour, including a piranha frenzy and a showdown between otters and crocodiles.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Caves
programme.desc: Although often overlooked, caves are remarkable habitats with equally bizarre wildlife. This documentary provides a unique access to a hidden world of stalactites, stalagmites, snotites and troglodytes that brings a wealth of surprises.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Enemy Among Us
programme.desc: Veteran captains are challenged when a new fleet of outsiders is pitted against them.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: War on the Water
programme.desc: The competition heats up when the original captains see the newcomers mean business.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Band of Brothers

programme.desc: Scientific evidence shows that when Columbus stepped ashore in 1492, millions of people were already living in the New World. Over the next 100 years, entire civilizations were wiped out when ships came over with plants, animals and disease.

programme.desc: Wrangling bison and work horses complicate a routine procedure.

programme.desc: Dr. Oakley is up all night with an emergency c-section, and gets kicked into shape by a horse.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Dances With Ibexes

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mystery of the Alien Base
programme.desc: Abandoned hangers and bunkers populate a bizarre facility in the middle of nowhere, but among them are other structures whose purpose are oddly obscured; experts investigate a highly-classified military cover-up with extraterrestrial objectives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Space Launch LIVE: Welcome to the ISS: Space Launch LIVE: Welcome to the ISS
programme.desc: Follow live coverage of SpaceX and NASA Crew-2 as they complete the final stage of their mission, docking the SpaceX Dragon capsule to the International Space Station.

programme.title: How It's Made: Super Robots
programme.desc: Discover how educational robots and boat radar mounts are constructed, and see how boxing belts are handcrafted.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Dragon's Fire
programme.desc: A dark object is captured flying among skyscrapers in China and an explosion engulfs the side of a high-rise in flames at the same moment; experts investigate this astonishing evidence of terrifying, dragon-like creatures.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Red Mustang
programme.desc: When 22-year-old LeAnne Martinez fails to pick up her daughter from her mother's house, her family worries. Her red Mustang is missing, and what they find inside her home will leave them forever scarred.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When a troubled young man befriends Jessica Vega via social media, the kind-hearted college student and single mom does her best to steer him towards a better path. Unfortunately, her good intentions will eventually come back to haunt her.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Devil at the Crossroads
programme.desc: 11-year-old Shauna Howe disappears as she returns home from a girl scouts Halloween party. When Shauna's body shows up in a local creek, her murder ignites an investigation, whose conclusion will send shockwaves through her community.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Icy Depths
programme.desc: 21-year-old Noel Alkaramla vanishes just before Thanksgiving. Her mother Debra suspects her daughter's antagonistic girlfriend. Investigators interrogate her and many others. But the answers can only be found in icy depths of the Hudson River.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Killing of Officer Green
programme.desc: A California police officer is shot dead in his home. His ex-wife admits she pulled the trigger. A photo on social media may have led to the death.

programme.title: See No Evil: In His Father's Footsteps
programme.desc: The ambush of 22-year-old college student Richard Bailey on October 20, 2008, leaves a community desperate for answers. With no forensic evidence left at the scene, detectives turn to surveillance footage to track down Richard's killer.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: Midnight Mass
programme.desc: In Evansville, Indiana, a family of four is murdered in their home. Detectives launch a manhunt to find the deranged killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: What Happened in the Sutton Place Apartment?
programme.desc: It's a story of wealth, privilege, and an early morning after-party that went terribly wrong. Erin Moriarty explores the last night of Joey Comunale's life and the cases against two privileged young men for taking part in a murder.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Cynthia
programme.desc: Cynthia Langrall is shot dead while out for morning jog through the Hillcrest Ranch neighborhood in Glendale, Arizona. Detectives obtain home surveillance footage, which helps to identify the murderer's vehicle, but may not lead to the actual killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Army of God
programme.desc: Deborah and Jim Green believe they're Generals in a holy army for God, for more than 30 years their harsh rule has destroyed families and ruined lives. Cult survivors reveal how the Greens transformed from charismatic hippies into militant cult leaders.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: The Movement of God
programme.desc: Charismatic preacher Sam Fife inspires a worldwide network of nondenominational Christian groups. To prepare for the apocalypse, followers renounce everything to move to the wilderness where they're subjected to beatings, exorcisms and brainwashing.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Wife's Double Life
programme.desc: When a young husband is thrown in jail for the murder of his newlywed wife, most people in their small Oklahoma community believed the case was solved. But odd cell tower records and surprising DNA evidence force investigators to take a second look.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Family Night Nightmare
programme.desc: Melissa Oxley is woken in the middle of the night to a shotgun blast and the smell of gunpowder, with her husband Ben, dead beside her.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Love Triangle of Evil
programme.desc: Shortly after Devon Guzman moves in with her partner Keary, she is found dead in the backseat of her car. Something doesn't add up, especially when police find out her relationship is an "open" one with more than one with more than one jealous lover.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Pretends to Be Human
programme.desc: When Kelly Pletcher heard what her ex-husband Wayne Adam Ford carried in his pocket while surrendering to police, she was horrified and disgusted - but not surprised. The real surprise was that she managed to escape before becoming one of his victims.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Hundred-Mile Murder
programme.desc: Miles City, Montana, holds its breath while police search for missing husband and father Marty Etchemendy. As they race to find Marty alive and track down those who ripped him from his family, an air of evil permeates an abandoned car 100 miles from town.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Blue Raincoat
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears on her way home from school, police find her blue raincoat thirty miles away. It marks the start of a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Who Wanted Him Dead?
programme.desc: A US soldier who's been to war in two foreign lands meets harm in Upstate New York and his killers may have been his fellow GIs. Then, a young father and aspiring politician disappears, with the main clue his last, haunting voicemail.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Killer Chatroom
programme.desc: A college student seeks solace online when the pressures of life begin to mount. When she meets a young nurse in a chat room going through similar troubles, the pair strike up an unbreakable bond. But she may have placed her trust in the wrong hands.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood Ties
programme.desc: A college student working as a radio station intern far from home is murdered, launching a long and frustrating investigation that leaves family and police on the brink of hopelessness until forensic genealogy leads to a man on the run for decades.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Panic Room
programme.desc: Two old friends reconnect when they end up renting a house a house together from an absentee landlord. But familiarity quickly turns into frustration, and an abusive relationship escalates to a violent death.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Wishing Well Mystery
programme.desc: After Alyce Seff's body is found in a wishing well, the town of German Village, Ohio, is shocked to find the elderly landlady had as many enemies as she did friends. It will take police nine years to solve her case.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Hammered on a Sailboat
programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Murder My Own Family
programme.desc: James Wiley was given a life sentence after killing his step-mom and three young brothers.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Learn to Tell Time
programme.desc: Tell time with the fab five as they rise and shine, enjoy daily meals, and get ready for bed.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mommy's Special Day / All Aboard Babies
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy help Mia make Captain Beakman the BIGGEST and most SPECIAL Mother’s Day present ever! When Lucky takes the baby train for a joyride, the Flyers must stop it!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Puppy Problems/ The Mighty Little Dragon
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a puppy who seems like a perfect angel, but turns out to be a mischievous rascal. Pip and Freddy pretend to be knights while delivering a Komodo dragon.

programme.title: Toon Bops: Walk the Dog
programme.desc: Dance while you learn to walk your dog.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko

programme.title: Bluey: Mr. Monkeyjocks/ Typewriter/ Burger Shop
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Big Jon Big Trouble/ Min's Quest

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble

programme.title: PJ Masks: Master of the Moat/ PJ Robot Vs Romeo

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Mini-Golfin' Guard Pups / Summer Splash Bash
programme.desc: When Santa and Mrs. Claus have an unusual problem during their summer vacation, the Pugs and Keia help save their trip! The Pugs help find the Queen of England's jeweled egg!

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.
