programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Trapped in the apocalypse and menaced by villains new and old, Dipper finds himself in a race against time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London with no human supervision.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beaks in the Shell!
programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Trickening!
programme.desc: The kids forego their usual trick-or-treat path and instead take on the most haunted house in Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!

programme.title: DuckTales: Let's Get Dangerous!

programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Crossbow and a Cross To Bear
programme.desc: Desperate for food, Gwen and Sarah lead the charge to build a crossbow in the bush while Ryan feels the pressure to provide. When new wildlife moves into his camp, Bulent is pushed to the edge. Medics remove a survivalist from the challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Banished But Not Broken Pt. 1
programme.desc: With extraction just days away, one survivalist goes against the group, is banished and must try to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah deploy crossbows as they push for one last kill. A deadly snake could end someone's challenge on Day 40.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Banished But Not Broken Pt. 2
programme.desc: One survivalist goes against the group, is banished and must try to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah deploy crossbows as they push for one last kill. A deadly snake could end someone's challenge on Day 40.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Legends vs. Swamp

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: A New Lead
programme.desc: Just as Josh, Casey and Jeff embark on a new season of fishing in Hawaii, business closures turn their world upside down. But when Josh's brother Jake uncovers a lead from their father, captain Phil Harris' past, it opens a door to a whole new market.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Luxury Repo
programme.desc: Nick Popovich gets his son to gather intelligence for a job.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Two If by Air, One If by Sea
programme.desc: Ken and Danny seize a luxury yacht and the debtor comes after them full-force. Mike devises a solution to get even with the deadbeat who bought his favourite plane and stopped paying. Kevin and Heather find themselves in the middle of a mid-air nightmare.

programme.desc: A confusing intersection results in a spectacular train crash; a picnic almost turns deadly when a stealth bomber crashes nearby; an eight-story building collapses in Manila; NASA crashes a Boeing 720 via remote control to study accident prevention.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Legends Challenge

programme.desc: George pursues blackfin tuna at Marathon in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Key West Yellowtailin'

programme.desc: Captains Tom and Rich fish for snappers with Brandon Simmons.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: The Grand Bahama Adventure
programme.desc: Rick and Greg Dornau pursue bonefish and big mutton snapper around the Northern Bahamian Islands.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Return to the Big Island
programme.desc: A year after finding his father's fishing charts, Josh and Casey return to Hawaii to grow their fledgling fishing business. Finding an industry in ruin, they join with business partner, Jeff Silva, to devise a strategy to navigate the waters ahead.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: With half the crab boats tied up, Sig devises a plan to save the fishery from destruction. As Bering Sea legend Johnathan Hillstrand returns with the Time Bandit to help, veterans struggle to prove they can work together to defend the American dream.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Belize Breakdown
programme.desc: On this fan episode of Naked and Afraid, pro surfer Anastasia Ashley, and YouTuber Cory Williams take their shot at surviving Naked and Afraid.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid Legends: Madagascar

programme.title: Naked and Afraid Legends: African Serengeti
programme.desc: Survivalist EJ Snyder looks back on the struggle to survive the tough terrain and predator-filled environment of the African Serengeti.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid Legends: Panama
programme.desc: Fan survivalist Max Djenohan looks back on the struggle to survive on a tropical island in Panama for 14 days, facing boa constrictors and monster spiders with no food, water or clothes.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump

programme.desc: Guy is making stops up and down the east coast for some home cooking. He checks out a Southern comfort join in Cambridge, Mass., pierogi in Fall River, and meatballs and fries in Providence.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: International Family Style
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy is taking a seat at some family restaurants. He stops at a sibling-run Vietnamese place in Utah serving authentic dishes using family recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One Street Wonders
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern to South American
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri digs into Southern comfort food and South American specialties. In Atlanta, a real-deal soul food spot dishing out collard green lasagna and a twist on fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: To Bakersfield and Beyond
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's giving some love to a little town with a lot of flavor. In Bakersfield, Calif., the landmark Basque spot serving a four-course meal including outrageous oxtail and garlic fried chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lots of Latin
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is loading up on all kinds of Latin on this trip. In Logan, Utah, a Salvadoran spot puttin' out pupusas and a cabeza creation. A funky food truck in Denver dishing out prime-time Puerto Rican specialties. And in Burlington, Vt.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Alaska
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Asia, Africa And India
programme.desc: Guy's going international with flavors from Asia, Africa and India. In Los Angeles, a funky fast Filipino joint spicin' up house-made hot dogs and piling pork adobo onto grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort and Soul
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' up some joints that'll warm the palate and the soul. In Portland, Ore., a funky neighbourhood cafe is cranking out comfort foods like the heartless artichoke sandwich and a curried lentil dish that hits all the right notes.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' over for the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Sunday Funday
programme.desc: Trisha prepares for a fun-filled day with fabulous friends by making Buffalo Wing Dip and Chili Mac. After fueling up, they head out for Prosecco Cocktails on a party bike.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: The Bluebird Cafe
programme.desc: Dishes include cornbread and chili bites, orange barbeque steak kabobs, and charred lemon ricotta dip with dippers.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Dinner and a Movie ... Outdoors
programme.desc: Valerie designs an Old Hollywood menu featuring brisket sliders with white barbecue sauce, horseradish potato salad and crunchy manchego.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: One More Time, It's a Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is always looking for the latest and greatest ways to prepare and use grilled chicken. She's sharing her latest tricks for picture-perfect birds with recipes like chicken fried rice.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet School Treats
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes divine chocolate treats for her daughter, including classic chocolate cups with homemade sugared orange.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Drummond Home Cooking
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a special meal to deliver to Beverly, the curator of the Drummond family's historic home and museum. Recipes include grape lemonade, old fashioned chicken stew, and lemon raspberry cream cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is exploring 16-minute marvels with four awesome weeknight dinners cooked against the clock. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches topped with warm red cabbage followed by a snappy Italian sausage pasta skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Pizza the Action
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is on the ranch cooking up some creative new pizzas. She shakes things up with a butternut squash crust pizza, makes a pizza dough bowl filled with a fabulous salad and thinks sweet with a brownie pizza.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Tour de Grand Forks
programme.desc: To begin a day of delicious food, Molly Yeh is making her big fluffy pancakes and sausage for breakfast. Then, for a picnic lunch, meaty prosciutto, cantaloupe and butter sandwiches are followed by the flakiest chocolate croissants ever.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl Meets Ice
programme.desc: Molly Yeh has figure skating fever, and she's making cozy dishes to share with her synchronized skating trio. She starts with Spiced Tomato ABCs, followed by Fried Beef Tacos, Cheesy Parmesan Broccoli and Coffee Cookie Butter Cones for dessert.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Fridays with Delilah
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites radio personality Delilah to her home to spend some quality time with her and her girlfriends. Dishes featured include Broccoli Cheddar Mac n' Cheese and more.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Southern Fusion
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood invites her friend Sarah Gavigan, owner of Japanese pub-style restaurant Bar Otaku, to her home for a Japanese-infused Southern meal.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Switch Up Your Spring Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen is rewriting the rule book for a spring feast with fun, new recipes that include jalapeno honey ham, easy rosemary deviled potatoes and chocolate matzoh bark for dessert. Plus, the hosts craft beautiful and simple metallic Easter eggs.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: Three Dreams
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks connects with a chef in Connecticut who needs to branch out from wings and burgers, a Vermont chef in need of a confidence boost and a Long Beach, NY, restaurant owner suffering from a lack of cooking and restaurant experience.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Kitchen Heroes
programme.desc: Charity is important at Flavortown Market, where most of the unused food is donated to local food shelters after each competition. With that in mind, Guy Fieri decides to showcase chefs who are giving back to their own communities every day.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Battle America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings in chefs from the four corners of the U.S. to see which region has the tastiest food. He starts off the competition by asking the chefs to cook their best regional sandwich, but on a budget.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Kelsey the Worthy

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Ferret Quest
programme.desc: The Creek Kids are on the search for an elusive ferret in the Creek. Kelsey unites her friends Stacks and Wildernessa to find it, but worries they'd rather hangout with each other instead of her.

programme.desc: Walden and Alan try to cheer up a lonely Herb, but end up partying a little too hard.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Another Night With Neil Diamond

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Bodacious Vidalia
programme.desc: When Walden encourages a depressed Alan to update his look and start dating again, Alan faces a moral dilemma when he attracts a married woman.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Advantage: Fat, Flying Baby

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Low, Guttural Tongue-Flapping Noise
programme.desc: Alan goes on a date with one of Charlie's gorgeous ex-girlfriends.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Always Wanted a Shaved Monkey
programme.desc: Evelyn calls Charlie to harass him over not calling her, and Judith bills Alan for an expensive pair of tennis shoes she bought Jake. Charlie and Alan begin to take their frustration out on one another.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Cows, Prepare to Be Tipped
programme.desc: Walden dates a hot 22-year-old but finds himself more interested in her grandmother. Meanwhile, Alan and Jake go on a father-son bonding trip.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nangnangnangnang

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Space-Werewolf-A-Rooney
programme.desc: To prove to the skeptics that she is meant to star in 'Space Werewolves', Liv agrees to do all her own stunts, not realizing exactly how complicated they are.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Mattress Stores and Music Factories
programme.desc: Austin in unable to find a new passion and feels forced to take a job at his parents' mattress store. Ally struggles to keep up with an arrival of music students. Dez and Trish try and help Austin and Ally with their problems.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Grand Openings and Great Expectations
programme.desc: The gang is in over their heads when they have less than a week to teach total novices how to play in a band in time for the A&A Music Factory's grand opening.

programme.title: Jessie: Basket Case
programme.desc: Eager to play in Luke's basketball game, Ravi unexpectedly runs into LA Clippers star Chris Paul, who he enlists to coach him. Meanwhile, Jessie learns that Hudson is her new classmate and is unhappily forced to partner with him for an assignment.

programme.title: Jessie: Someone Has Tou-pay
programme.desc: Bertram bought a new toupee for his band's big performance, but when it goes missing, Jessie interrogates each of the kids in hopes of finding it.

programme.title: Jessie: Bye Bye Bertie
programme.desc: Bertram has had enough, so decides to quit and to go work for Mrs. Chesterfield. Meanwhile, the Ross family hires a new butler, Roger, who takes his job very seriously.

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school. The girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad! Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Catalyst (Heroes' Day, Part 1)
programme.desc: It's Heroes' Day in Paris and everyone must do a good deed for the occasion. But the day turns into a nightmare when Hawk Moth akumatizes Nathalie into Catalyst.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Mayura (Heroes' Day, Part 2)
programme.desc: Hawk Moth has put his dreadful plan into action and re-akumatized all his former villains with Catalyst's help.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Parade Day/ DIY Guys
programme.desc: Cricket leaves Gloria to work the coffee shop alone while he enjoys the parade on his break.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Barry Cuda/ Suite Retreat
programme.desc: Cricket uses his first tip from working at Big Coffee to buy a singing toy fish. Gramma kicks the family out of the house for the day.

programme.title: Amphibia: Bessie and MicroAngelo/ The Third Temple
programme.desc: Bessie is tasked with showing MicroAngelo, the farm's new snail, the ropes. Anne and Marcy need help from an old friend to find the final key to returning home.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Chameleon
programme.desc: When Lila is confronted with her own lies, she asks Hawk Moth to akumatize her. Now Chameleon, she can take on the appearance of anyone, starting with Adrien.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Animaestro
programme.desc: A film director gets akumatized into Animaestro, and is determined to show the world what animated films can do.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: My Own First Enemies
programme.desc: Sydney struggles with navigating the pitfalls of social media when she posts her music online and receives negative comments.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Slumber Years
programme.desc: Raven reminds the kids to take a break from their screens as they settle into their nightly routines, but Booker, Nia and Levi have other plans.

programme.title: Movie: Zapped
programme.desc: A girl's well-ordered life is upended when her mother remarries and she finds herself part of a family composed of rambunctious and most of all messy boys and a male dog.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Bakerix
programme.desc: When Marinetta's grandfather is akumatized into Bakerix, he wants to destroy everything he deems too modern.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Startrain
programme.desc: Max's mom gets akumatized into Startrain. Now at the controls of a flying train, she wants to realize her dream of becoming an astronaut.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Kwamibuster
programme.desc: Mrs. Mendeleiev gets akumatized into Kwamibuster. She wants to capture Tikki and Plagg to prove to the world that these magic creatures are real. Ladybug and Cat Noir will have to protect their secret at all costs.

programme.title: Jessie: From the White House to Our House
programme.desc: Zuri befriends Taylor, a military dependent, whose mother is deployed overseas.

programme.title: Jessie: Ride to Riches
programme.desc: Jessie is determined to get to an important audition, but she and Ravi end up on the 'Rides to Riches' game show where contestants can win prizes during their taxi ride.

programme.title: Jessie: Between the Swoon and New York City
programme.desc: Jessie hits it off with a new guy she meets in the park unaware that he is Ms. Chesterfield's son.

programme.title: Jessie: No Money, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Mrs. Chesterfield has cut off Brooks financially, so Tony and Jessie get Brooks a job as an elevator attendant. Mrs. Chesterfield is appalled and has Betram go on a mission to get dirt on Jessie than can lead to her and Brooks' breakup.

programme.title: The Communicators
programme.desc: A weekly program focusing on the politics of telecommunications through conversations with the people who shape the digital future.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Newsmakers
programme.desc: An opportunity to access the full story behind today's headlines, as the news unfolds.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Death in a Small Town
programme.desc: An 80-year-old woman is found in her home lying in a pool of blood. Her death is ruled an accident but her family suspects foul play. In a tightknit community where neighbors look out for each other, who would want to hurt a beloved grandmother?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: A decorated war hero is found in his home, the victim of an apparent drug overdose. Investigators uncover a twisted story of fraud and betrayal that leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: A pastor places a frantic 911 call, pleading for help to save his fiancée who he says just shot herself. As investigators follow the unravelling truth, and look closer at the crime scene, a darker side to this happy relationship stuns everyone.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unraveled
programme.desc: For an agonizing four days, the fear was paralyzing. A city was under siege. Six people had been gunned down, but how were the killings linked? A retired detective connected the dots, initiating the manhunt for a man with a gun and a grudge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unspeakable
programme.desc: Sandra and Jamie Melgar were high school sweethearts who were celebrating their 32nd anniversary. Then, the intimate evening turned deadly. To crack the case, investigators had to uncover the secrets of an illusion worthy of the great Houdini.

programme.title: Living With a Serial Killer: The Suffolk Strangler: Steve Wright
programme.desc: For 10 days in 2006, an unidentified killer terrified the rural town of Ipswich snatching five prostitutes from the streets and strangling them to death. When Pam Wright discovers that the killer was her own partner, her world begins to crumble.

programme.title: Living With a Serial Killer: Scotland's Worst Predator: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin raped and murdered Angelika Kluk in 2006, but police suspected this was not his first kill. With the help of Tobin's ex-wife Cathy Wilson, a ground-breaking investigation unearthed more victims, and revealed Tobin as a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Before Midnight
programme.desc: A successful business woman and mother of three is found shot in her office. She was the center of her kids' universe, dedicated to her financial planning firm and had recently gotten engaged.

programme.title: Dateline: Before Dawn
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead in her bedroom just months after marrying her high school sweetheart. Investigators soon uncover secret lives and simmering feuds swirling around her murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Before Dawn
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead in her bedroom just months after marrying her high school sweetheart. Investigators soon uncover secret lives and simmering feuds swirling around her murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Scorned
programme.desc: Keith Morrison reports on a love triangle that led to years of stalking, destruction of property, threats and murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Scorned
programme.desc: Keith Morrison reports on a love triangle that led to years of stalking, destruction of property, threats and murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: For over a decade, El Chapo evaded authorities but one man was determined to catch the infamous kingpin. Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search and capture with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted
programme.desc: A man is shot after answering a local help wanted ad. Detectives soon discover there are other victims with eerily similar stories. Their quest to locate a possible serial killer leads them to a suspected killer working for an evil manipulator.

programme.title: Snapped: Jordan Graham
programme.desc: When the body of a newlywed is spotted at the base of a cliff in Glacier National Park, local and federal authorities join forces for an investigation that will put their skills to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Snapped: Kari Willoughby
programme.desc: After a well-known saddle maker passes away from an apparent heart attack, police find reason to question the natural death after rumors about drugs and embezzlement come to light.

programme.title: Snapped: Cindy McKay
programme.desc: The discovery of a victim's burning body disrupts the peace one February night and puts investigators on the trail of an elusive criminal whose desire for financial gain led to murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Nanette Litherland
programme.desc: When a household is targeted by gunfire twice in a short amount of time, investigators in rural Missouri sift through a community in search of a family's enemies which leads them to a mastermind pulling strings.

programme.title: Snapped: Jasmine Harlee
programme.desc: An investigation into the mysterious death of a loving mother leads authorities to uncover a diabolical plot hatched close to home.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Patterson
programme.desc: After an endearing World War II veteran and family man is laid to rest from apparent natural causes, a surprise witness surfaces with murder accusations, sparking a police investigation into a devious predator.

programme.title: Snapped: Theresa Voss
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in the trunk of a burning car, police in Ohio sift through the ashes for clues... but as the years slip by without an arrest, will a killer evade capture.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wettest Stories Ever Told
programme.desc: When the Simpsons' plans for a family outing at the Frying Dutchman turn into a dining disaster, they try to salvage the night by telling different stories of disasters at sea. Lisa recounts the Mayflower voyage, and Bart tells tales of Tahitian mutiny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: G.I. D'oh
programme.desc: After Bart gets out of a commitment to join the army at 18, Homer falls prey to a couple of army recruiters and lands himself in basic training. Homer, of course, treats it like summer camp and infuriates his hard-nosed colonel.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Revenge Is a Dish Best Served Three Times
programme.desc: The Simpson family tells each other tales of revenge gone wrong. Marge offers a cautionary tale of revenge from 19th century France before Bart's story follows the great crime-fighter 'Red Revenge.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love, Springfieldian Style
programme.desc: When Marge and Homer get trapped in a tunnel of love, they entertain each other with their takes on the Bonnie and Clyde, the 'Lady and the Tramp' and the Sex Pistols romances.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Debarted
programme.desc: A new tough-talking kid teams up with Bart to pull off pranks. When Bart's pranks seem to backfire, Groundskeeper Willie warns him that he may have a rat in his group of friends. Bart must figure out who the backstabber is before it's too late.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All About Lisa
programme.desc: As Krusty's new assistant, Lisa steals the spotlight and gets her own show, leaving Krusty behind. Meanwhile, Bart and Homer spend some time bonding through their newfound love of coin collecting.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangerous Curves
programme.desc: When the Simpson family takes a road trip to a cabin in the woods, a series of flashbacks depict Homer and Marge's blissful courtship and their early, married years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Four Springfielders are prompted to try to right past regrets following the funeral of a beloved neighbour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How I Wet Your Mother
programme.desc: Karma gets the best of Homer after he gets his friends in trouble, and as a result, his bedwetting problem worsens. The family tries to infiltrate his dreams to search for clues in his subconscious to determine the source of his problem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brick Like Me
programme.desc: Homer wakes up in a world where his family and everyone in Springfield are made of Legos. Can he 'put together' how he got there and figure out how to get home before he's stuck in a world of bricks forever?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Barthood
programme.desc: Bart's coming of age story, a la 'Boyhood,' chronicles his life from six years old to his time as an accomplished young man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Haw-Haw Land
programme.desc: When the Simpsons go to a STEM conference, Lisa falls for a crooning jazz pianist named Brendan. Meanwhile, Bart discovers that he has an affinity for chemistry.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programme.desc: Springfield is in an uproar after Principal Skinner makes a sexist comment at the end of an Itchy and Scratchy musical. Principal Skinner is replaced by Melanie Upfoot, a women's education expert, who divides the school into two different schools.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: When Bart and Milhouse pull off a prank at Springfield Elementary, Milhouse takes the fall and gets suspended from school. As punishment, Homer forces Bart to visit Grampa at his retirement home where he becomes smitten with a volunteer named Jenny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hello Gutter, Hello Fadder
programme.desc: Homer bowls a perfect game and becomes a Springfield celebrity.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Scoutz 'N the Hood
programme.desc: After drinking a very sugary beverage, Bart awakens with no memory of what happened and discovers he has joined a boy scout troop. Bart and Homer reluctantly take a father-son river rafting trip that has them encountering disaster in every turn.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerazzi
programme.desc: Marge is inspired to purchase a fireproof safe to protect the family's most precious valuables after a candle on Homer's birthday cake sets fire to his party hat. A freak accident causes the safe to explode, forcing Marge to restage the family's photos.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grift of the Magi
programme.desc: When a private company buys the school, Lisa discovers that it's a top toy company conducting research to design their hot new Christmas toy. Lisa and Bart go to investigate the company but are stymied by its security guard, Gary Coleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: When Homer takes Marge out to a nightclub, a hypnotist places him under a spell.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII
programme.desc: Maggie becomes possessed by an ancient demon, Lisa discovers a creepy yet perfect version of her family in an alternate universe and Homer cannibalizes himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miseducation of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: The sea captain finds a treasure he's been searching for all his life, but it's taken from him by the townspeople. Marge convinces the people of Springfield to build a S.T.E.M. school with the money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: He Loves to Fly and He D'ohs
programme.desc: After Homer saves Mr. Burns from drowning, Burns thanks him by taking him on a whirlwind trip to Chicago on his private plane. After returning home, Homer makes it his mission to find a job that offers him the chance to fly on a corporate jet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dumbbell Indemnity
programme.desc: Moe and Homer hatch an insurance scam to get money for Moe's new girlfriend, Renee.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fear of Flying
programme.desc: Marge's fear of flying is revealed after the family earns a free trip anywhere in the U.S.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Goes From Rags to Riches
programme.desc: After Moe is heckled for not having any real companions, Moe's best friend and beloved bar rag narrates his incredible 1,000-year journey to Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: When a pigeon flies through the Simpsons' home and suffers a broken wing, Bart makes it his duty to care for the bird and nurse it back to health. When the pigeon is ready to fly, Homer decides to enter it in a bird race.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm With Cupid
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Apu makes other husbands look bad by showering his wife with gifts.

programme.title: The Simpsons: When You Dish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Homer becomes the personal assistant to actors Kim Basinger and Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Big Girl
programme.desc: Lisa decides to take creative licence in crafting her heritage as a Native American when she discovers that the Simpson family tree is less than exciting. The innocent embellishment leads to her speaking at the National Native American Tribal Council.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Twisted World of Marge Simpson
programme.desc: Marge is thrown out of the women's investment group, so she buys a Pretzel Wagon franchise. When her business struggles to thrive, Homer secretly makes a deal with Fat Tony and the Mob.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Three Men and a Comic Book
programme.desc: Bart takes a part-time job to earn money to buy the first Radioactive Man comic book.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Star Is Born Again
programme.desc: Every man in Springfield is smitten when a famous and sultry movie star swoops into town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. Patty and Selma
programme.desc: Homer's latest money making scheme backfires and he goes to Patty and Selma for money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Girlfriend
programme.desc: Bart's love for the minister's daughter is short-lived when she steals from the church.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brother, Can You Spare Two Dimes?
programme.desc: Herbert Powell returns and asks the Simpsons for financial help for an invention.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Front
programme.desc: Using 'Abraham Simpson' as their pseudonym, Bart and Lisa are hired as writers for The Itchy & Scratchy Show and eventually win an Emmy award for their work.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet
programme.desc: After the kids find an album cover with Homer's picture on it, Homer reveals that he used to perform in a barbershop quartet with Principal Skinner, Chief Wiggum and Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Star Is Burns
programme.desc: In order to boost Springfield's popularity, the town residents decide to hold a film festival and invite film critic Jay Sherman to take part in the jury.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: One Wild Day: Grasslands
programme.desc: See how animals such as lions, sengi and hippos survive 24 hours in Africa's Great Plains.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas

programme.title: Animal Babies: Safari Babies
programme.desc: Young animals struggle to overcome challenges on the African savannah.

programme.title: Animal Babies: Mountain Babies
programme.desc: Mountain Babies must battle the weather and hungry predators, and just getting around this environment is tough for youngsters. It's a huge adventure and all these trials must be overcome if they are to grow up to become successful adults.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Urban Wild
programme.desc: Moving beyond the wild parts of Singapore, Sir David Attenborough takes us through a day in the life of the wildlife residing in Singapore's urban environments, from civets taking up residence in roof cavities to pythons hunting in drains.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.desc: A teenager roars back through time to 1955, where he meets his parents at a young age.

programme.title: Movie: Back to the Future III

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Grieving father screams at son's murderer; Angry defendant flips a table; Woman convicted of murder says judge 'unfair.'; Famous magician forced to reveal secrets; Mother punches two men at custody hearing; Judge sentences troubled teen to art project.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Trial by Violence
programme.desc: A father lunges at a serial killer; a defendant attempts to stab an attorney; an Alaskan wildlife enthusiast is tased; a daughter yells at her father's killer; a man threatens a female judge; a defendant walks out of his trial; a man lights up in court.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Selena
programme.desc: Explores the story beyond the movie, a shocking, heartbreaking crime that extinguished a bright star's life and career.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: Monster
programme.desc: A look at the life of Aileen Wuornos, America's first female serial killer and the woman Hollywood dubbed 'Monster.' In a never before seen interview, Aileen reveals intimate details of the love affair that led her to killer seven men.

programme.title: Reel Crime/ Real Story: To Die for
programme.desc: Explores the case of the high school teacher whose teenage student and lover killed her husband.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Deadly Business
programme.desc: A mother of three goes missing. Her car is found in flames but she is nowhere in sight. As police begin to investigate, they find she had been keeping a secret from her family-one that would point the case in an entirely new direction.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Desire
programme.desc: 34-year-old Paige Birgfeld is the ultimate multi-tasker - balancing four jobs, three kids, and two ex-husbands. No one realizes that beneath all this activity, Paige is also hiding a deep, dark secret that will eventually lead to an evil betrayal.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sugar and Spite
programme.desc: They look sugar coated, but these deadly women are anything but.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Hostage to Greed
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a legal secretary in her Macon, Georgia home leaves police with few clues as to who would want her dead. Then, a co-worker's alibi falls apart, revealing a callous conspiracy of greed that shocks this genteel, southern town.

programme.title: See No Evil: Headlights and Fire
programme.desc: In Pierce County, Washington, a woman's body is found set on fire beside a dead-end road. Detectives struggle to identify their victim, until cameras lead to a shocking discovery at the woman's home and put them on the trail of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Dance
programme.desc: When a bright, young, exotic dancer is found dead at the bottom of a 12-story bridge, detectives must determine if it's a suicide or the work of a sinister character who wanted more than a dance.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Gold
programme.desc: Gold is one the most rare treasures on Earth. Since ancient times, man has gone to extreme and often deadly lengths to get it. But where is most of the gold today, and who owns it?

programme.title: Brothels That Built America
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions, brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion. Explore why these dens have endured for thousands of years.

programme.title: America's Hidden Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities, underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time. They have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Air Aces: Gabby Gabreski
programme.desc: U.S. Air Force Pilot Francis Gabby Gabreski made it his personal mission to be the best flying ace there ever was.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead
programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house on Lake Arrowhead in Georgia. With the help of their daughters Danielle and Allie, they're hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Northeast Texas Turnaround
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state. Their agent helps them find a lakefront property in northeast Texas that may be their dream home, but its current state requires quite a bit of TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Brew: The Reload
programme.desc: A lot has happened in the world of coffee since this show dropped in 2000; since then, Alton Brownhas brewed (and consumed) a lot of coffee. Here's his new look at roasting, grinding, brewing and thegear you need to do it.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Raising the Steaks: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this show on 'budget' steaks with new ways of cooking his favourite: top sirloin steak. Then there's a close look at why we 'flip' meat and a new angle on the broiler.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon/ Psilakis vs. Carro Brothers
programme.desc: Italian brothers Nicola and Fabrizio Carro enter Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Michael Symon paired with Chef Michael Psilakis.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Casella
programme.desc: Iron Chef Jose Garces takes on master Italian Chef Cesare Casella in a seafood duel.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Izard Vs. Battes

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Charleston
programme.desc: Ali heads south to Charleston and starts the day off right with creamy grits topped with all the morning classics. Then a crab cake sandwich that's the talk of the town, followed by seafood-stuffed hushpuppies.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Providence Eats
programme.desc: Ali starts off his challenge with a Portuguese sweet bread French toast for breakfast, in Providence.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Hot Deals in the Desert
programme.desc: Ali Khan looks for the best meal deals in Scottsdale, Arizona. He starts out strong with a double serving of Southern barbecue scones piled high with savory pulled pork.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fruity Foodie
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shines the spotlight on fruit, one of the unsung heroes when it comes to food. Fruit has the ability to elevate just about any meal, so fill your plate with this fruity goodness to get your daily serving and then some.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Flavor Mashups
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds that marrying different dishes to create something new is a genius life hack. Whether it's a combination of cultures or a surprising mix of your favorite flavors, a good mashup is an exciting way to bring your meal to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Philadelphia
programme.desc: We're going to Philadelphia to show you some of the best things we ever ate. There's impossibly delicious pasta at Vetri and perfect mashed potatoes at Parc.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Portland
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Portland, Oregon where free thinking foodies are pushing the limits when it comes to creating what to eat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Calabria
programme.desc: Andrew showcases Calabria, a rugged region in the toe of Italy's boot. The area sees a diverse range of ingredients that shine in signature dishes like fileja noodles with goat and parmigiana di melanzane.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seville
programme.desc: Andrew explores the capitol of Andalusian culture, Seville, Spain.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Phoenix, AZ
programme.desc: Casey heads to Arizona to unearth the Phoenix's most appetizing eats and take on eight wings slathered in a scorching ghost chili and habanero sauce plus two whole grilled habanero peppers.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Contagi-Anne/ Family Shrub
programme.desc: Anne fakes getting sick to get off work, but the rest of the family gets sick. Sprig and Polly think their family history is boring, until they uncover family secrets.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Friendly Face / Big Chibi 6
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero Battle / Go Go the Wooweroo
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: A Fresh Sparkles / Noodle Burger Ploy
programme.desc: When Big Hero 6 find Mr. Sparkles working at the Pizza Party-torium, he tells them he’s decided to leave the world of crime behind. Noodle Burger Boy and the mascots abduct Fred.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: The Rise of Dock Ock: Part One
Marvel's Spider-Man: The Rise of Dock Ock: Part Two
Marvel's Spider-Man: The Rise of Dock Ock: Part Three
Marvel's Spider-Man: The Rise of Dock Ock: Part Four
Beyblade: Burst Surge: The Jet-Black Sun! Vex Lucius!
Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: A Right Royal Rumble / Dal-Martians
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The MiSFIT/ Return to Sycorax
programme.desc: In order to recruit child prodigy, Rishi Patel, Professor Granville enlists Hiro to give him a tour of SFIT. Krei goes missing in the old Sycorax building.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: The Owl House: Adventures in the Elements
programme.desc: Luz needs to learn a new spell, so Eda takes her to the most magical place on the island to train.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Glitch
Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Last Day of Summer
programme.desc: Candace uses the last day of summer to bust her brothers, but things go out of control with Doofenshmirtz's Do-Over-Inator.

programme.title: Football
programme.desc: Football.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 1964: The Greatest Draft Ever
programme.desc: In a draft that includes 11 Hall of Famers, the Dallas Cowboys and their computer revolutionize the NFL's scarcely covered player selection meeting.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 1965: Spies, Superstars and Babysitters
Caught in the Draft: 1974: The Future is Now
Caught in the Draft: 1975: Agents of Change
programme.desc: In a draft that would be remembered for Walter Payton, top pick Steve Bartkowski sets the NFL world afire by asking his college dorm-mate Leigh Steinberg to negotiate his contract.

programme.title: 30 for 30: Elway to Marino
programme.desc: Explores the landmark 1983 NFL draft through the eyes of the players, head coaches, general managers, team owners and agents who participated including Marvin Demoff, who represented both John Elway and Dan Marino.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 1984
programme.desc: George Orwell's novel looms over the proceedings and the NFL engages in a war with the upstart USFL. Maryland's Boomer Esiason slips precipitously in the draft and BYU's Steve Young receives an offer he can't refuse.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 1985: Schemes and Dreams
programme.desc: Bill Walsh trades up with the New England Patriots and lands wide receiver Jerry Rice, but former Bengals head coach Sam Wyche reveals Walsh's frantic efforts to instead trade for the top-billed receiver in the draft, Eddie Brown.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 1994: A Day That Will Live in Infamy
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of highly touted quarterbacks Trent Dilfer and Heath Shuler jockeying for position, a verbal spat between draftnik Mel Kiper, Jr. and Bill Tobin of the Indianapolis Colts turns the Draft into must see television.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 1995: Expansion
programme.desc: Despite wowing at the NFL scouting combine, workout warrior Mike Mamula struggles on the field. Highly-touted running back Kijana Carter has a disappointing career, while draft afterthoughts Terrell Davis and Curtis Martin become stars.

programme.title: The Brady 6
programme.desc: A look back at Tom Brady's selection in the 6th round of the 2000 NFL Draft and the six quarterbacks taken before him.

programme.title: Caught in the Draft: 2005: How Low Will Aaron Go?
programme.desc: Aaron Rodgers drops in the draft while waiting in the Green Room, while former New York Giants general manager Ernie Accorsi enjoys his best draft ever.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof
programme.desc: Investigates the worst arson spree in U.S. history which occurred in Seattle.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Intervention: Nathan
programme.desc: An outstanding athlete, Nathan excelled at sports at an early age, but when he was 19, a fight at a local bar left him with a ruptured ACL, a painful injury that left him with an addiction to prescription opioids.

programme.title: Intervention: Courtney
programme.desc: An adventurous child with a love for animals, Courtney dreamed of growing up to be a veterinarian. Tragically, when she was just seven years old, her best friend died in a drowning accident and Courtney was never the same.

programme.title: Intervention: Allison
programme.desc: She was a pre-med student on her way to becoming a surgeon, but the trauma of being molested as a child and her parents' brutal divorce haunted Allison. She started to inhale computer dust remover, which is potentially fatal with each breath.

programme.title: Intervention: Brittany
programme.desc: Brittany once dreamed of becoming a police officer to protect people from the traumas that she faced as a child. But at 22, her goal is slipping away. She's a heroin addict who sells her body to get her next high.

programme.title: Intervention: Sarah/ Mikeal
programme.desc: Like Romeo and Juliet on heroin, Mikeal and Sarah are a poor boy and a rich girl who have found solace in each other's pain.

programme.title: Intervention: Susie and Miriam
programme.desc: These attractive and charismatic 41-year-old twins battle crack and alcohol addictions and each other as their career success and families slowly slip away.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Big Trick Energy: A Car Is Torn

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Fortune Feimster

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
